title: Insane Summer Split
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:iNSANE Summer Split}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=iNSANE Summer Split |icon= |tickername=ISS |shortname=ISS |image=INSANE Summer Split.png |type=Online |team_number=19 |series=iNSANE Summer Split |organizer= TEAM iNSANE |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/teaminsane_esports/ |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/teaminsane_esports/ TEAM iNSANE] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-09-23 |edate=2021-09-25 |instagram=teaminsane_esports |web= https://teaminsane.gg/ |youtube=channel/UCJxRJMlXCWRIOk4L0CYpKuQ |twitter= |discord=4b8ThjfwdM }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/teaminsane_esports/ TEAM iNSANE]''' present a BGMI invitational tournament called the '''''iNSANE Summer Split''''' with a prize pool of ₹1,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=HornetFear|b1flag=in|b1name=Prashant Shukla |b2=Raider|b2flag=in|b2name=Shashank Singh }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''iNSANE Summer Split:''' 25th August 2021 to 26th September 2021.'' '''''Pre-Qualifiers:''' 25th August 2021 to 4th September 2021'' * '' A total of 2000 teams will play in Pre-Qualifiers * '' Teams to be divided into 100 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a single match'' * '' Top 8 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 800 teams}} advance to Qualifiers.''
'''''Qualifiers:''' 6th September 2021 to 9th September 2021'' * '' A total of 800 teams will play in Qualifiers * '' Teams to be divided into 40 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a single match'' * '' Top 6 Teams from each group will qualify for the Group Stages''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 240 teams}} advance to the Group Stages.''
'''''Group Stages:''' 11th September 2021 to 12th September 2021'' * '' A total of 240 teams will play in Group Stages * '' Teams to be divided into 12 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a total of 2 matches'' * '' Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Quarter-Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 48 teams}} advance to the Quarter-Finals.''
'''''Quarter-Finals:''' 14th September 2021 to 15th September 2021'' * '' A total of 60 teams (48 Qualified + 12 Invited) will play in Quarter-Finals * '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a total of 3 matches'' * '' Top 9 Teams from each group will qualify for the Semi Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 27 teams}} advance to Group Stages.''
'''''Semi Finals:''' 16th September 2021 to 17th September 2021'' * '' A total of 40 teams (27 Qualified + 13 Invited) will play in the Semi Finals'' * '' Teams to be divided into 2 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a total of 4 matches'' * '' Top 3 Teams from each group will qualify for the Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 6 teams}} will advance to the Finals.''
'''''Finals:''' 19th September 2021 to 21st September 2021'' * '' A total of 20 teams (6 Qualified + 14 Invited) will play in the Finals'' * '' Each team will get to play a total of 9 matches'' * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 3 teams}} will advance to the Grand Finals.''
'''''Grand Finals:''' 23rd September 2021 to 25th September 2021'' * '' A total of 18 teams (3 Qualified + 16 Invited) will play in the Grand Finals'' * '' Teams will get to play a total of 16 matches in a period of 4 days'' * '' Each day will feature a total of 4 matches'' ====Matchdays==== * ''3 Matchdays: 4 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>S>>M ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For details on the points matrix, '''Click here'''.}}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-16}}||1 |- |{{Placement|17-19}}||0 |}
